title.en: Manufacturing: paint-booth exhaust heat to 70°C wash water
title.zh: 制造：涂装废气余热提升至 70°C 清洗热水

excerpt.en: Illustrative low-lift heat pump recovering booth exhaust to supply parts wash water.
excerpt.zh: 示意案例：低温升热泵回收涂装废气热量，供应零件清洗热水。

technology.en: Air-to-water heat pump + glycol recovery coil
technology.zh: 空气—水热泵 + 乙二醇回收盘管

title.zh: 化工：45°C 冷却水回水提升至 110°C 工艺加热

excerpt.en: Illustrative cascade / two-stage concept for a solvent recovery heater, displacing LP steam.
excerpt.zh: 示意案例：溶剂回收加热用两级/复叠概念，替代低压蒸汽。

technology.zh: 两级或复叠蒸汽压缩热泵

title.en: Food plant: 90°C process water from 35°C wash effluent
title.zh: 食品厂：35°C 洗涤废水提升至 90°C 工艺热水

excerpt.en: Illustrative case: single-stage HFC/HFO heat pump replacing a gas boiler for CIP and wash water.
excerpt.zh: 示意案例：单级 HFC/HFO 热泵替代燃气锅炉，供应 CIP 与洗涤热水。

technology.zh: 单级螺杆蒸汽压缩热泵
